compiled_state.title: Update project-setup SKILL.md Jira credential sections for auto-detection
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Unit Test Exemption: skill files (per AC library)

Update project-setup SKILL.md Jira sections to use jira-credential-helper.sh.

## Implementation
- Step 3 Q11: use helper for auto-detection, offer env vars as defaults
- Step 6.5 B1/B2: auto-fill from detected JIRA_URL/JIRA_USER
- Step 6.5 C1: add confirmation gate before gh secret set JIRA_API_TOKEN
- Sub-step D: add gh variable set JIRA_PROJECT
- Write jira.project to dso-config.conf

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] SKILL.md references jira-credential-helper.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'jira-credential-helper.sh' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/project-setup/SKILL.md
- [ ] JIRA_PROJECT gh variable set documented
  Verify: grep -q 'JIRA_PROJECT' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/project-setup/SKILL.md
- [ ] Confirmation gate for JIRA_API_TOKEN documented
  Verify: grep -q 'confirm.*JIRA_API_TOKEN\|CONFIRM_BEFORE_COPY' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/project-setup/SKILL.md
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Review amendment: (1) Update Step 6.5 completion summary block to include JIRA_PROJECT in GitHub variables set list. (2) Clarify JIRA_PROJECT handoff: re-use jira.project value from dso-config.conf (written in Step 3 Q11) for gh variable set in Sub-step D.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
